creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 165448
svn diff to fix irc/ircproxy ( patch )

The source for this port went missing.
I use this, so I'm fixing it. :)

This pr(1) provides/changes:

MASTER_SITES, MAINTAINER a clearer pkg-descr

That's it!

prove it's fixed. :)

dev.box# make -DBATCH extract
===>  License GPLv3 accepted by the user
===>   ircproxy-1.3.6_4 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> ircproxy-1.3.6.tar.bz2 doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://BSDforge.com/projects/source/irc/ircproxy/ircproxy-1.3.6.tar.bz2
ircproxy-1.3.6.tar.bz2                        100% of  236 kB  1800 MBps 00m00s
===> Fetching all distfiles required by ircproxy-1.3.6_4 for building
===>  Extracting for ircproxy-1.3.6_4
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for ircproxy-1.3.6.tar.bz2.

dev.box# make distclean
===>  Cleaning for ircproxy-1.3.6_4
===>  Deleting distfiles for ircproxy-1.3.6_4

Thanks!

--Chris

easy, patch, patch-ready
